title: cousinia sagittata subsp. iranica
intro: Cousinia sagittata subsp. iranica, also known as Cousinia or Cousinia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Iran and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cousinia sagittata subsp. iranica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
